creator: dougs@dawnsign.com
text:
net-im/openfire is now out in version 4.2.3 which fixes an issue with updating plug-ins. I am at version 4.2.2,1 and am experiencing that issue. I would like the net-im/openfire port to be updated to the latest version.

I emailed the maintainer on 6/11/18 and have yet to hear back.
